name: Lenovo Laptop Support (experimental)
author: Sensor Readout
description: Experimental, opt-in Lenovo laptop probe. Reads ThinkPad fan WMI, ACPI thermal zones, ACPI battery WMI (cycle count, full-charge capacity, charge/discharge rate, voltage, estimated runtime, power state, design capacity, chemistry, manufacturer), IdeaPad Lenovo_BatteryInformation (manufacturer ID, hardware ID, manufacture date), thermal throttle reasons and passive limits, system thermal state, storage health/temperature/wear for NVMe and SATA drives, and reports presence of Lenovo vendor WMI interfaces.
